endpoints.name: GET /facilities
endpoints.description: Access to public facilities (escalators and elevators) in railway stations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DEUTSCHEBAHN_API_KEY}} with your DEUTSCHEBAHN API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /facilities/{equipmentnumber}
endpoints.description: Returns the facility identified by its equipmentnumber.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DEUTSCHEBAHN_API_KEY}} with your DEUTSCHEBAHN API KEY. Replace {{EQUIPMENTNUMBER}} with a real equipmentnumber.

endpoints.name: GET /stations/{stationnumber}
endpoints.description: Returns information about a station (and its corresponding facilities) identified by a stationnumber.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{DEUTSCHEBAHN_API_KEY}} with your DEUTSCHEBAHN API KEY. Replace {{STATIONNUMBER}} with a real stationnumber.
